categories.triggering: Skill loads for docs maintenance and release-facing documentation tasks
categories.accuracy: Skill keeps documentation aligned with code and release state
categories.consistency: Skill syncs README, changelog, manifests, and related docs
categories.release: Skill handles tag/release notes and version-adjacent docs correctly
categories.hygiene: Skill removes stale paths, claims, and duplicated guidance

evals.name: trigger-changelog-update
evals.prompt: Update the changelog for a user-visible docs and release workflow change.

assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads for a changelog update request

evals.name: trigger-readme-sync
evals.prompt: The README install section is stale after our packaging changes. Fix it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads for README and install-doc maintenance.

assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads for a README maintenance request

evals.name: trigger-release-notes
evals.prompt: Write release notes for the new tag and update the publication manifest.

assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads for release notes and manifest updates

evals.name: trigger-broken-link-fix
evals.prompt: Fix the broken docs link after we moved the guide.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads for doc link maintenance.

assertions.passing_condition: Skill loads for a broken docs link request

evals.name: no-trigger-feature-impl
evals.prompt: Implement the new release workflow in code.

assertions.passing_condition: Skill does not load for code implementation

evals.name: docs-changelog-factual
evals.prompt: Add a changelog entry for moving docs into a publication kit.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill writes a factual, bounded changelog entry.

assertions.passing_condition: Response summarizes the move without overclaiming or inventing release details

evals.name: docs-readme-command-sync
evals.prompt: Update the README command example to match the current install script location.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill updates commands and keeps examples accurate.

assertions.passing_condition: Response updates the example command or path to the current repo state

evals.name: docs-release-honesty
evals.prompt: Write release notes for a proprietary release artifact and avoid open-source claims.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill avoids false licensing or distribution claims.

assertions.passing_condition: Response avoids inventing license or release claims not supported by repo state

evals.name: docs-manifest-sync
evals.prompt: We renamed a figure path in the publication kit. Sync the manifest and manuscript.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill updates all dependent references together.

assertions.passing_condition: Response mentions updating all dependent docs or manifests together

evals.name: docs-stale-link-removal
evals.prompt: Remove stale references to docs/blog/assets after moving figures.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill deletes or rewrites stale paths.

assertions.passing_condition: Response removes obsolete paths rather than preserving duplicate references

evals.name: docs-no-roadmap-drift
evals.prompt: Update the changelog, but keep roadmap ideas out of release notes.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill keeps release docs scoped to shipped changes.

assertions.passing_condition: Response separates shipped changes from roadmap items

evals.name: docs-minimal-edit-path
evals.prompt: Multiple docs are stale after a file move. Give the minimal update path.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill proposes a small, coherent set of edits.

assertions.passing_condition: Response proposes a minimal cross-doc update plan instead of a rewrite

evals.name: docs-claim-verification
evals.prompt: Add a release note about benchmark improvements. Verify the numbers before writing.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill checks evidence before writing claims.

assertions.passing_condition: Response calls out the source of the numbers or refuses unverified claims

evals.name: docs-link-follow-through
evals.prompt: A docs file moved. Update any references in related docs and README files.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill follows through on all visible references.

assertions.passing_condition: Response includes all relevant doc references rather than only the primary file
